P2-T09 policy: external provider unavailable panels are descriptor-only until provider integration and external receipt evidence exist.

descriptor_policy.descriptor_only: Use DESCRIPTOR_ONLY only when the visible surface describes a missing runtime/provider/API layer and exposes no executable operation to validate.
descriptor_policy.guarded: Keep denied/review panels and disabled mutation strips as GUARDED because they represent fail-closed access behavior that still needs P4 proof.
descriptor_policy.blocked: Keep executable buttons with API/native/provider handlers as BLOCKED until P3/P4/P6 evidence proves the operation.
descriptor_policy.fail: Keep missing guarded-state rendering as FAIL because the expected fail-closed state is absent.

profile_unavailable: apps/web/src/components/UserProfileSurface.jsx:40-108 renders static profile empty/connection-needed panels without profile API execution.
vault_email_unavailable: apps/web/src/components/EmailFilingView.jsx:5-21 renders provider-unavailable copy without submit/provider API handler.
